channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Madurai District to Conduct Census 2027 in August with Digital Enumeration
item.description: The first phase of Census 2027 in Madurai will be conducted from 1st to 30th August, as announced by District Collector K J Praveen Kumar. This is the eighth census since India’s Independence and the ...

item.title: Ghaziabad Incident: Rape Accused Welcomed by Supporters After Bail, Opposition Criticises State Government
item.description: In a disturbing incident from Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, a man accused of rape received a celebratory welcome from his supporters after being granted bail. Video footage from the area shows the accused...

item.title: Lara confronts Jalil for disobedience in Episode 32 of Blood vs Duty
item.description: In Episode 32 of the popular Filipino TV series 'Blood vs Duty,' tensions rise as Lara confronts Jalil for not following her instructions properly. The episode delves into the complexities of loyalty,...

item.title: Arusha High Court Sentences Former Security Guard to Death for Murder of Oscar Patrice in Karatu
item.description: The Arusha High Court has sentenced former security guard Mr Jacob Ndoole to death by hanging after finding him guilty of murdering Oscar Patrice at Agobafra Guest House in Karatu District, Arusha Reg...

item.title: Trump's Visible Hand Bruising Noted at White House Health Care Affordability Event
item.description: During a White House event focused on health care affordability on May 18, 2026, President Donald Trump appeared alongside officials including CMS Administrator Mehmet Oz, Health Secretary Robert F. K...

item.title: Bishop Kukah Reveals How Gowon’s Abuja Land Was Revoked and Later Restored
item.description: For inside Abuja recently, Bishop Matthew Hassan Kukah yan about how former FCT Minister, Nasir El-Rufai, remove plot of land wey belong to ex-Head of State, Yakubu Gowon. According to the Bishop, Gow...

item.title: Local Foods to Support Your Immune System During Winter
item.description: With cold fronts and heavy rains making South African winters harsher each year, staying healthy indoors has become increasingly important. According to the National Institute for Communicable Disease...

item.title: Rio Ferdinand visits Tanzania to promote football and tourism
item.description: Former England football star Rio Ferdinand was warmly welcomed on his first visit to Tanzania, arriving at Julius Nyerere International Airport on Tuesday. The reception included traditional dances, c...

item.title: Nigerian Man Extradited to US Over Alleged Online Romance Fraud
item.description: Samuel Ugberaese, one Nigerian man, don dey custody for US after dem bring am come from Naija. Na federal authorities take am, and e dey face serious allegations wey involve big online romance scam an...

item.title: Privatisation Commission Seeks Investors for Sale of Three Key Power Distribution Companies
item.description: The Privatisation Commission of Pakistan has formally invited local and international investors to submit expressions of interest (EOIs) for the partial or full sale of three major electricity distrib...

item.title: Grace Jones: Iconic Stage Performances from the 1970s and 1980s
item.description: Grace Jones, born Grace Beverly Jones on May 19, 1948, in Spanish Town, Jamaica, is a renowned singer, songwriter, model, and actress celebrated for her bold, androgynous style and deep contralto voic...

item.title: Elon Musk Questions Lupita Nyong’o’s Casting as Helen of Troy in Nolan’s Film
item.description: Billionaire and entrepreneur Elon Musk recently sparked a lot of conversation online after criticising the casting choice of Lupita Nyong’o in the upcoming film adaptation of The Odyssey. According to...

item.title: UPS Cargo Plane Crash in Louisville Kills 15 After Engine Detachment
item.description: A UPS cargo plane crashed in Louisville, Kentucky, last November after one of its engines separated during takeoff, killing 15 people, including three aboard and 12 on the ground. Newly released video...

item.title: Mini Crossword and Superquiz for May 20
item.description: The Age is offering its readers a chance to test their wits with the Superquiz and Mini Crossword for Wednesday, May 20, 2026. The Mini Crossword is designed as a compact puzzle featuring ten clues sp...

item.title: CAF to conduct 2027 Afcon qualifiers draw with Kenya, Uganda, and Tanzania as hosts
item.description: On Tuesday, May 19, 2026, Harambee Stars will discover the teams they will face in the 2027 Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) qualifiers during a draw at the Egyptian Football Association headquarters in ...

item.title: Johnny Cash and June Carter's 1967 Photoshoot for 'Carryin’ On' Album
item.description: In July 1967, country music legends Johnny Cash and June Carter participated in a photoshoot for the cover of their collaborative album 'Carryin’ On with Johnny Cash & June Carter.' The album, release...

item.title: Cocoa farming improves incomes and livelihoods for smallholders in Muheza District
item.description: For many years, smallholder cocoa farmers in Muheza District, Tanga Region, faced unstable markets and exploitation by middlemen, which kept their incomes low and unpredictable. Recently, the introduc...

item.title: Comelec explains procedure for filling party-list vacancies after resignations
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) announced that it will not immediately conduct special elections to fill the seats vacated by 1Tahanan party-list Rep. Nathaniel Oducado and Pinoy Workers party-l...

item.title: Alberta Responds Variously to Pipeline Agreement Signed by Carney and Smith
item.description: Alberta has seen a range of responses following the signing of a pipeline agreement between Carney and Smith. The deal, which aims to expand pipeline infrastructure and increase oil transport capacity...

item.title: Government Apprenticeship Program Expected to Boost Youth Employment
item.description: Government officials and experts in Tanzania dey emphasise say the apprenticeship system fit play big role in tackling youth unemployment problem. This system dey aim to equip young people with practi...
